name: AI research assistant with Exa web search and Slack Q&A
description: Takes a question, searches the web with Exa to find authoritative answers, uses Claude AI to synthesize a comprehensive answer with citations, and posts the response to Slack.

source.originalName: Query Perplexity AI from your n8n workflows

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the answer

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for the Q&A response

question.description: Question to research and answer (e.g. 'What are the latest AI regulations in the EU?')

steps.name: Compile source material from search results
Build AI prompt for question answering
Run Claude AI to answer the question
Build Slack Block Kit Q&A response
